message:
test: pin sys/utsname.h + sys/uio.h conformance via differential harness

Adds two harnesses:
- conformance_diff_uname.rs: 3 functions (uname, gethostname,
  getdomainname). 5 tests pass, 0 divergences.
- conformance_diff_readv_writev.rs: 4 functions (readv, writev,
  preadv, pwritev). Cross fl<->lc transfer via socketpair (5-chunk
  gather), offset-based scatter/gather on tempfile, invalid-iovcnt
  edge. 4 tests pass, 0 divergences.

Beads: bd-utsn1, bd-uio1
